---> ngrok http 8080

properties.subject: Gemini 웹 앱을 사용하고 계십니다
properties.cc_raw: 날짜: Fri Jan 30 2026 18:32:32 GMT-0500 (Eastern Standard Time)
properties.body_raw:
웹에서 Gemini 최대한 활용하기



Google의 AI 어시스턴트, Gemini에 오신 것을 환영합니다. Gemini를 활용해  

마음껏 창의력을 발휘하고 생산성을 높여 보세요. Gemini 웹  

앱(gemini.google.com<https://gemini.google.com>)을 이용하여 글을 쓰고  

창작하고 학습할 때 도움을 받을 수 있습니다. 웹에서 Gemini로 할 수 있는  

작업에 관해 자세히  

알아보세요<https://support.google.com/gemini/answer/13275745?hl=ko>.



Gemini가 데이터를 처리하고 다른 서비스와 함께 작동하는 방식



Gemini 활동 및 사용자 관리 설정



채팅, Gemini와 공유한 자료(파일, 동영상, 화면, 사진 등), 오디오, 스크립트,  

Gemini Live와의 대화 레코딩, 내가 제공한 의견, Gemini를 통해 방문한  

웹사이트의 정보, 제품 사용 정보, 위치  

정보<https://g.co/privacypolicy/location>는 Gemini 앱  

활동<https://myactivity.google.com/product/gemini>에 저장됩니다(활동 기록  

유지 설정이 켜져 있는 경우). 이 데이터는 전문 교육을 받은 서비스 제공업체의  

검토를 거쳐 Google 서비스(Gemini  

모델<https://deepmind.google/technologies/gemini/> 및 기타 생성형 AI 모델  

포함)를 개선하는 데 사용됩니다. 또한 설정 및 지역에 따라 사용자 환경을  

맞춤설정<https://support.google.com/gemini?p=gaa_on_personalization&hl=ko>하는  

데도 사용됩니다. Google은 서비스 개선을 위해 사용자 활동을 사용할 때 인적  

검토자의 도움을 받습니다. 검토를 위해 채팅을 서비스 제공업체로 전송할 때는  

개인 정보 보호를 위해 먼저 계정에서 분리합니다. 언제든지 활동 기록  

유지<https://myactivity.google.com/product/gemini?utm_source=gemini> 설정을  

사용 중지할 수 있습니다. 검토되거나 사용되기를 원하지 않는 정보는 포함하지  

마세요.



다른 서비스와 연동되는 Gemini



Gemini는 Google 지도, YouTube 등 다른 도구, 앱, 서비스에서 실시간 정보를  

가져와 대답할 수 있습니다. Google Workspace 및 YouTube Music과 같은  

서비스를 연결할 수도 있습니다. 도움이 되는 연결된 앱을 찾으면 Gemini는  

대화에서 얻은 정보 및 기타 관련 정보를 해당 앱으로 전송하여 더 관련성 높은  

대답을 생성합니다. 설정에서 앱을 관리할 수 있습니다. 자세히  

알아보세요<https://support.google.com/gemini/answer/13695044?hl=ko&visit_id=638633132691845063-1690936925&p=faq_extensions&rd=1>.

Build Smarter GenAI Apps With Neo4j and GraphRAG Tuesday, February 10 9:00 a.m. IST | 11:30 a.m. SGT/HKT/CST | 12:30 p.m. JST | 2:30 p.m. AEDT Hi 인선,

Build GenAI applications you can trust by powering RAG with knowledge graphs for deeper context and real business impact. This session provides practical code examples you can apply immediately, along with best practices from AWS and Neo4j experts for building reliable and trustworthy GenAI and agentic apps.

You’ll learn: 

  • Why traditional RAG falls short when it comes to accuracy and trust
  • How to combine vector search and knowledge graphs for rich context

properties.subject: From Entities to Connections: unraveling graph data modeling
properties.cc_raw: 날짜: Tue Jan 27 2026 10:00:06 GMT-0500 (Eastern Standard Time)
properties.body_raw:
Learn about graph data modeling vs. relational data modeling







 <https://neo4j.com/>







Before loading CSV data into your instance, there's one more crucial step you 

need to take to complete the import process: data modeling.





Rather than creating a model consisting of multiple tables and JOIN operations 

using index lookups, data modeling with Neo4j works differently using 

index-free adjacency. Start by identifying nodes and their respective 

properties, and then define the relationships between the nodes.





Check out our docs below which cover data modeling in more detail:



Data Modeling Documentation 

<https://neo4j.com/docs/getting-started/data-modeling/> 







Graph data modeling in action



Learn how Threatmapper, the fastest growing open-source security platform, 

created a flexible schemaless data model to detect vulnerabilities across 

100,000 Kubernetes nodes and EC2 Servers whilereducing resource usage by 70% 

<https://www.deepfence.io/blog/scaling-threatmapper-detecting-threats-on-100k-servers-and-beyond?mkt_tok=NzEwLVJSQy0zMzUAAAGMjOTUqNV8zkQ48QIGML0WncTg8RGw8Yli0VruBu0k1OqpQLGI6fNqGxv04-pLsyGRytR0pdkuY_ihknPqXiPvtjDOXooyY0a0Cvy7gUwIEUBWIKM>

.

properties.body_raw:
Our docs, video tutorials, and our online course are here to help you along 

your graph journey







 <https://neo4j.com/>







Regardless of where you are along your journey - whether you’re still learning 

the ropes or ready to start your own project - we understand certain graph 

concepts take time to master.







With that in mind, here are some additional resources to help you along your 

journey:









Getting Started Resources 

<https://neo4j.com/docs/getting-started/appendix/getting-started-resources/>



Documents on graph concepts, relational vs. graph databases, Cypher, and data 

modeling.





Aura DB Tutorials 

<https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL9Hl4pk2FsvVZaoIpfsfpdzEXxyUJlAYw>



Learn how AuraDB works as you watch us import, model, and query custom 

datasets.

















 







Video









Learn how to import data into AuraDB using our data import tool:









 <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2MaclMuLcBA> 







 







If you want to learn about graphs in an interactive fashion, check out our 

free online developer course,GraphAcademy. This covers everything from graph

properties.cc_raw: 날짜: Mon Jan 19 2026 10:00:02 GMT-0500 (Eastern Standard Time)
properties.body_raw:
Data import resources







 <https://neo4j.com/>







Now that you understand the basics of graph, let’s walk you through how to 

import CSV data into AuraDB with our data import guide. To get started, head 

over to AuraDB and connect to your instance. After that, the guides selection 

screen will appear, and you can begin your data import guide.







Quick Tip: The connection URI and password are inside the file you downloaded 

when you first created your instance.





Start the Data Import Guide 

<https://workspace-preview.neo4j.io/guide/selection> 







Don’t have any data to play with? That’s OK! We have a dataset you can use 

inside the guide.







If you find the data import tool isn’t right for your unique needs, here are 

some other resources to help you out:



 * Learn about additional ways to load CSV 

<https://neo4j.com/docs/aura/auradb/importing/importing-data/> data into your 

database

 * Learn how to import data from a RDBMS 

<https://neo4j.com/docs/getting-started/appendix/tutorials/guide-import-relational-and-etl/>

 * Learn how to connect your application using a variety of programming 

languages <https://neo4j.com/docs/aura/auradb/connecting-applications/overview/>

For additional data import or graph questions, ask our community 

<https://community.neo4j.com/> or reply to this email with any of your 

questions/concerns.







Sincerely,



The AuraDB Team

properties.cc_raw: 날짜: Sat Jan 17 2026 10:00:00 GMT-0500 (Eastern Standard Time)
properties.body_raw:
Deploy a graph database in minutes. 







 <https://neo4j.com/>



Hey there,







Here’s an insider tip: there are many ways to populate your graph database 

instance. A fuss-free approach is to useNeo4j Data Importer, a no-code tool to 

load data in your database.No complex query writing is required. 







To get started, watch this video on how to import a Kaggle Star Wars database 

into AuraDB:









 <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fdPWH4P4V5A>



You can find sample datasets from Kaggle.com 

<https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/?utm_content=day3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=freeflow>

,Github repository, 

<https://github.com/neo4j-graph-examples/?utm_content=day3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=freeflow>

 our console or bring your own to build the graph model you want. your content. 







 <https://console.neo4j.io/#create-database>



Pro tips:



 * Username will be neo4j (no caps). 

 * Password is auto generated. Download the auto-generated password within the 

.txt file for every new database instance you create. In the file, you’ll find 

your database URL username, password, and instance name.



Alternatively, follow the step-by-step documentation 

<https://neo4j.com/docs/aura/auradb/getting-started/create-database/?utm_content=day3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=freeflow>

 to create an instance.







Help and support



Reach out to the Neo4j Community, 

<https://community.neo4j.com/t5/neo4j-graph-platform/bd-p/graph_platform?utm_content=day3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=freeflow>

 review ourFAQs 

<https://neo4j.com/cloud/aura/faq/?utm_content=day3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=freeflow>

, watch ourfun dataset videos 

<https://neo4j.com/video/discover-aura-free-with-fun-datasets/?utm_content=day3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=freeflow>

, andshare feedback 

<https://aura.feedback.neo4j.com/questions-and-general-feedback/?utm_content=day3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=freeflow>

. 



All the best,

The AuraDB Team

properties.body_raw:
We're excited to have you!







 <https://neo4j.com/>







Welcome to Neo4j, fellow graphista! 







I’m Adam from the Developer Relations team, and I’m delighted to see that you 

have taken the first step on an exciting journey by signing up for Neo4j Aura 

I’m here to support you as you move forward.







I understand how daunting it can feel to start with an empty database and not 

know what to do next. This is where Neo4j GraphAcademy, our free, hands-on 

training platform, comes in. GraphAcademy has more than 20 courses with 30+ 

hours of free content written by experts, designed to help YOU make the most of 

Neo4j.







Whether you are a developer, a data scientist, or just passionate about data, 

we invite you to join over 70,000 successful learners enrolling in 

GraphAcademy. We haveBeginners Courses <https://graphacademy.neo4j.com/> 

covering everything from Neo4j Fundamentals to modeling and importing data, a

dedicated path for Data Scientists 

<https://graphacademy.neo4j.com/categories/data-scientist/>, and a Building 

Neo4j Applications series for Developers. 

<https://graphacademy.neo4j.com/categories/developer/> For those interested in 

Generative AI, we have courses explaininghow to leverage Knowledge Graphs to 

ground Large Language Models (LLMS) in truth 

<https://graphacademy.neo4j.com/categories/llms/>. 







I have personally poured hundreds of hours and expertise into GraphAcademy, 

and with over 70,000 successful learners so far, I'm confident it will provide 

you with the skills and confidence needed to tackle any data challenge.





Complete courses and earn free swag!



These courses will set you along the path to Neo4j Certification 

<https://graphacademy.neo4j.com/certification/>. Achieving a Neo4j 

Certification is a great way to demonstrate your expertise and share your 

success with peers. As a bonus, you'll receive a free limited edition t-shirt 

to celebrate your accomplishment.







Join the community



GraphAcademy isn’t just about courses; it’s about becoming part of a global 

community of developers and data enthusiasts. It's about sharing, learning, and 

growing together.



Join our Discord server <https://dev.neo4j.com/chat> or participate in 

discussions on the community forums <https://dev.neo4j.com/forum> to 

contribute, share your insights, learn from others, and help us grow together.







Ready to build?



Login to AuraDB <https://console.neo4j.io/?product=aura-db>. Get started with 

a Free instance, and scale as you need with our Professional tier.







I look forward to seeing you grow with us!







Happy graphing,



Adam and the AuraDB Team







---







We're dedicated to supporting your journey every step of the way. Should you 

need any advice on where to start or have questions, don't hesitate to get in 

touch. Our goal is to ensure your learning experience is both enjoyable and 

rewarding.
